segments.text: [Speaker Notes] Chapter 15, Opener, Tropical rainforests are often referred to as the lungs of the planet, breathing in CO2 and exhaling O2 through the process of photosynthesis. Deforestation is a major threat to the ability of these rainforests to regulate global CO2 levels.
